<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|image=<%~ it.icon %>
|image_alt=<%~ it.name %> icon
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox mission
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
|icon=<%~ it.icon %>
<% if (it.missionType) { -%>
|mission_type=<%~ it.missionType %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.typeName) { -%>
|type_name=<%~ it.typeName %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.colorHex) { -%>
|color=<%~ it.colorHex %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.minLevelToStart) { -%>
|min_level=<%= it.minLevelToStart %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.minIntensity) { -%>
|min_intensity=<%= it.minIntensity %>
<% } -%>
|extract_at_end=<%~ it.extractAtEnd %>
|selectable=<%~ it.selectable %>
<% if (it.flagsList) { -%>
|flags=<%~ it.flagsList %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasBoss) { -%>
|boss=<%~ it.bossName %>
<% } -%>
}}<section end="infobox" />
<% if (it.hasDescription) { %>
<section begin="description" /><%~ it.descriptionText %><section end="description" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasBriefing) { %>
<section begin="briefing" /><blockquote>"<%~ it.briefingQuote %>"</blockquote><section end="briefing" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasVoicelines) { %>
<section begin="voicelines" />
<%~ it.voicelinesSection -%>
<section end="voicelines" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasStages) { %>
<section begin="stages" />
<%~ it.stagesSection -%>
<section end="stages" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasRewards) { %>
<section begin="rewards" />
<%~ it.rewardsSection -%>
<section end="rewards" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasRelated) { %>
<section begin="related" />
<%~ it.relatedSection -%>
<section end="related" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Missions]]
<% if (it.hasMissionTypeCategory) { -%>
[[Category:<%= it.missionType %> Missions]]
<% } -%>
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated mission source pages]]
